description: This API is used to set the MUST simulation annotation options in the active Slider diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. setdiagresmust(setscope, option1, option2, option3, option4)

parameters.name: option2
parameters.description: Specifies the simulation result/value to display. (input).

parameters.name: option3
parameters.description: Specifies the dynamic quantity to contour. (input).

parameters.name: option4
parameters.description: Specifies the dynamic quantity to contour. (input).

setscope.description: defaults for new diagrams and settings for the active diagram.

option1.description: defaults for new diagrams and settings for the active diagram.

option2.description: voltage violations as specified by SET_VOLTAGE_REC_CHECK and SET_VOLTAGE_DIP_CHECK.
